# ITagContainerPropertyItem Interface

## Extends
- *IPropertyItemBase*

A property item which supports Tag Container properties

## Properties

### **tags**
`read-only tags: ReadonlyArray<string>;`

Current tags value of the property item.

Type: *ReadonlyArray<string>*

### **tagsPool**
`read-only tagsPool: ReadonlyArray<string>;`

Current tags pool value of the property item.

Type: *ReadonlyArray<string>*
